_meta.note: PARSER-GENERATED. Validate by diff against hand-derived records.

records.name: Plus Alpha

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation: *2021 (post-IPO SaaS-mania peak):* stock ¥2,050 (Aug 16) – ¥4,480 (Nov 22) per Nikkei 10-year history; Nov 22 2021 ¥4,480 was the all-time high in the 5-year window. PAC IPO'd in 2021 and rode the SaaS-mania wave. FY9/2021 actual financials not directly surfaced. Stock-move catalyst: 2021 SaaS-mania peak + post-IPO momentum for a fresh HR-SaaS name. Sign summary: shares rallied to all-time high ¥4,480 (Nov 22) on SaaS-mania-driven post-IPO momentum.

records.name: Plus Alpha

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation: *2022 (post-mania derating begins):* stock ¥1,927 (Feb 24) – ¥3,280 (Jan 4); from Nov 2021 peak ¥4,480 to Feb 2022 trough ¥1,927 = approximately -57% in 3 months. FY9/2022 actuals not directly surfaced; multi-year trend implies revenue continued growing rapidly. Stock-move catalyst for the post-Nov-2021 collapse: 2022 SaaS-multiple compression / global growth-stock derating (same pattern as PLAID 2022, Rakus 2022, Money Forward 2022). Sign summary: revenue rose on continued strong growth; shares fell sharply to ¥1,927 multi-year low; stock depressed despite operational strength. 業績 ◎ (revenue, partial) / 株価 ✕✕ (post-IPO-mania derating).

records.name: Plus Alpha

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation: *2023 (revenue compounding while stock stays de-rated):* stock ¥2,262 (Oct 31) – ¥3,650 (Jun 19); modest recovery but stayed well off the 2021 peak. **FY9/2023 actual: revenue +41.2% YoY, operating profit +39.3% YoY** per logmi-finance — strong growth confirmed at hypergrowth scale. Sign summary: revenue rose +41.2% YoY; operating profit rose +39.3%; record growth in Talent Palette; shares range-bound (¥2,262 – ¥3,650); stock depressed despite hypergrowth. 業績 ◎◎ (hypergrowth) / 株価 ✕ (under-priced de-rated grower).

records.name: Plus Alpha

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation: *2024 (multi-year derating bottoms — fundamentals keep accelerating):* stock ¥1,463 (Aug 5) – ¥2,790 (Jan 11); Aug 2024 ¥1,463 was a new multi-year low — from the Nov 2021 peak ¥4,480, the trough = -67%. **FY9/2024 actual (announced Nov 8, 2024): revenue ¥9,341M (+14.2% YoY), operating profit ¥3,692M (+32.2% YoY)** per kabutan + 決算短信. Operating profit growth substantially outpaced revenue growth — margin expansion. Sign summary: revenue rose +14.2% YoY; operating profit rose +32.2%; operating margin expanding to record levels; shares fell to ¥1,463 multi-year low (Aug 5) despite the +32% OP growth; stock depressed. **The widening gap between accelerating profitability and depressed stock = classic under_priced_de_rated_grower at scale** (same shape as PLAID 2024, Rakus 2024, Money Forward 2024). 業績 ◎ (revenue + margin expansion) / 株価 ✕✕ (multi-year low).

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (record results — derating finally arrests):* stock ¥1,163 (Apr 7) – ¥2,612 (Aug 14); Apr 2025 ¥1,163 was the absolute multi-year low (-74% from peak), then recovered to ¥2,612 by August (+125% off the spring low). **FY9/2025 actual (announced Nov 14, 2025): revenue ¥17,084M (+22.8% YoY organic / +83% reported including segment expansion), operating profit ¥6,378M (+40.8% YoY), operating margin 37.3%** (high for SaaS); enterprise customer ratio rising, ARPU rising, HR Solutions segment leading. Plan achievement: revenue 100.5%, OP 104.6% per IR. Sign summary: revenue rose +22.8% YoY organically; operating profit rose +40.8%; operating margin 37.3% record; shares rallied off ¥1,163 spring low to ¥2,612 high (Aug 14) — +125% intra-year. 業績 ◎◎ (record results + margin expansion) / 株価 ◎ (recovery from multi-year low).

Cautious side: stock still well below the Nov 2021 peak of ¥4,480 (Aug 2025 high ¥2,612 = -42% off ATH); the 2021 peak was hype-driven post-IPO mania at a level unjustified by fundamentals, so it may not be a meaningful target; revenue mix shift from SMB toward enterprise raises ARPU but lengthens sales cycle; competitive HR-SaaS pressure (Money Forward, freee, Visional all expanding).

Sources:
- https://equity.jiji.com/storage/tdnet/140120241107515258.pdf (FY9/2024 通期決算短信, Nov 8, 2024)
- https://finance-frontend-pc-dist.west.edge.storage-yahoo.jp/disclosure/20251114/20251113501423.pdf (FY9/2025 通期決算短信, Nov 14, 2025)
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/378612 (FY23 +41.2% / +39.3% strong-growth context + mid-term plan revision)
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/382931 (FY25 record + FY26 plan + enterprise-ratio rise)
- https://finance-frontend-pc-dist.west.edge.storage-yahoo.jp/disclosure/20251114/20251113500859.pdf (FY9/2025 4Q 決算説明資料)
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/company/history/yprice/?scode=4071 (Nikkei 10-year price history)
records.bearCase: stock still well below the Nov 2021 peak of ¥4,480 (Aug 2025 high ¥2,612 = -42% off ATH); the 2021 peak was hype-driven post-IPO mania at a level unjustified by fundamentals, so it may not be a meaningful target; revenue mix shift from SMB toward enterprise raises ARPU but lengthens sales cycle; competitive HR-SaaS pressure (Money Forward, freee, Visional all expanding)
